Delivered:

- src/proxy.rs: 11 new tests (normalize_base_url, determine_provider, extract_usage_from_sse_event x4, SSE timeout const, ProxyError HTTP status, strip_cache_control_ttl x2)
- src/session/mod.rs: 9 new tests (TokenUsage total/accumulate, record_actual_usage, turn numbers, session context, idempotent file, start_initializer, VDD store/take)
- src/session/task.rs: 8 new tests (status display, new_task_starts_pending, single_in_progress invariant, nonexistent update, delete returns Ok(None), cycle detection, reverse blocked_by sync, format_detail)
Total: 46 new tests across 5 files.
